task: Update relevant Datalox docs to reflect the clarified goal: desktop agent plus Datalox MCP records structured debugging trajectories for B2B dataset/eval sales, and add a canonical schema document to prevent drift.
step: update product docs and schema contract
summary: Updated canonical product docs, onboarding docs, host instruction surfaces, TODO direction, package metadata, and tests to align on Datalox MCP as desktop-agent instrumentation plus verified trajectory dataset export. Added docs/trajectory-dataset-schema.md as the canonical debugging_trajectory.v1 JSONL row contract.
observations: docs/product-definition.md now states the commercial goal: users run a desktop agent, Datalox MCP records consented verified trajectories, and curated rows become datasets/evals for AI companies.

docs/trajectory-dataset-schema.md defines debugging_trajectory.v1 with task, source, data_rights, reproduction, context, agent_trace, failed_attempts, knowledge_used, solution, verification, outcome, generalization, and knowledge_feedback.
README, START_HERE, DATALOX, AGENTS, CLAUDE, GEMINI, WIKI, Cursor, Copilot, and Windsurf instruction surfaces now point to the schema when work touches trajectory recording/export/data sale.
Tests were updated for the new Copilot wording and to make the agent config test fixture include all required runtime endpoints.
title: Updated canonical product docs, onboarding docs, host instruction surfaces, TODO direction, package metadata, and tests…
signal: Product docs previously framed Datalox mainly as a local knowledge system; the clarified repo goal is B2B trajectory dataset export powered by desktop-agent usage.
interpretation: The docs needed one canonical business definition plus one canonical schema contract so future agents do not drift between local-memory and dataset-export framings.
recommendedAction: Next implementation step is a trajectory export command/module that reads Datalox events and emits JSONL rows validated against debugging_trajectory.v1.
outcome: npm test passed: 13 test files, 122 tests. npm run build passed. Datalox lint returned ok:true with 24 existing warning-level note/reference issues.
